text:
try one more


> > A hang can indicate an IRQ issue.
>> >
I try to enable USB debugging (thanks to Hans Petter Selasky ):
set hw.usb.ehci.debug=15

But no changes are. After
ehci0: [GIANT LOCKED]
ehci0: [ITHREAD]
system hang.
when kernel loading - no additional information is not show
